allow: Bash(/d/MATLAB/R2025b/bin/matlab -batch "addpath\('lib'\); disp\('Starting 3D reconstruction...'\); tic; reconstruct_3d_scatterers\('CenterAngles', [30, 60, 90, 120, 150], 'CleanMaxIter', 30, 'CleanThreshold', 0.05\); elapsed = toc; fprintf\('Total: %.1f s\\n', elapsed\);")

Bash(/d/MATLAB/R2025b/bin/matlab -batch "d=load\('results/scatter3d_data_20260618010638.mat'\); sc=d.all_scatterers; for th=[30,60,90,120,150], idx=abs\(sc\(:,5\)-th\)<0.1; if any\(idx\), fprintf\('th=%d: x=[%.3f,%.3f] z=[%.3f,%.3f] n=%d\\n',th,min\(sc\(idx,1\)\),max\(sc\(idx,1\)\),min\(sc\(idx,3\)\),max\(sc\(idx,3\)\),sum\(idx\)\); end; end")
